results.title: Former The Chapel pastor admits to sexual abuse of two minors
results.description: The former executive pastor at The Chapel has pleaded guilty to sexual abuse involving two minors on Monday.

results.title: Kevin Feige's Response to the Future of Female-Led MCU Projects Gets Dragged by Fans
results.description: Kevin Feige attended the Shanghai Expo this past week, and gave fans a few updates on future MCU projects. While most of the news was exciting, one bit ruffled some feathers. While taking questions from the audience, Feige was asked by a fan if there were more female-led projects in the works, and Feige responded, “Well, Marvel is 90 years old, there are so many great female characters and some of my favorite female characters are in a group called the X-Men, and the X-Men are coming up very, very soon.” On the one hand, Feige has been saying there are female-led superhero projects theoretically in the works for the last decade, and this non-answer must be frustrating for fans who are hoping for storylines like Lady Liberators, A-Force, Dora Milaje and the like. But on the other hand, Feige is coming out of an MCU slump, and the films focusing on the women of Marvel have been hit or miss in the past. His current focus is Spider-Man: Brand New Day , Avengers: Doomsday , and Avengers: Secret Wars , with the promise of the new X-Men on the horizon. I wouldn’t rule out a cool team up women superheroes at some point, but it’s just not in the immediate plans. For now, I’m happy with the lady characters in the MCU and the stories in which they play pivotal roles. Kevin Feige reaffirms that the X-Men are joining the MCU "Well, Marvel is 90 years old, there are so many great female characters and some of my favorite female characters are in a group called the X-Men, and the X-Men are coming up very, very soon" (via: 艺东西 on RedNote) pic.twitter.com/LoKLZWamvr — Avengers Updates (@AvengersUpdated) July 11, 2026 I’m crying. He got specifically asked where are the female led projects, and he just said “well! there will be some women in the x-men films!” https://t.co/UMSbg5Ytab — Max❤️‍🔥 (@bayomob) July 11, 2026 They sure don’t know how to handle their female characters or even protect their actresses. It’s so embarrassing — Antenna (@mysteryantenna) July 11, 2026 Said the man who only put one woman on the X-men in Doomsday. — Garrett Carter (@quipquest) July 11, 2026 She’s so real for asking about more female-led projects and I hate that Feige’s answer was a deflection https://t.co/EPQXl8H9tN — Logan (@DiamondSpiderP) July 11, 2026 sorry it’s really irritating me that we have five confirmed female characters in the next avengers movie. no captain marvel, no jean grey, no storm, no rogue, no america chavez, no scarlet switch, no ms marvel, no photon, no kate bishop, no ironheart... like what are we doing — not fiona 💫 (@spinneretmj) July 11, 2026

results.title: BPD requests help finding missing man considered at-risk
results.description: The Bakersfield Police Department is asking for the public’s help in finding a missing man who it considers at-risk because of his mental health condition.

Rescue agencies put on high alert as Jhelum braces for seasonal rains
results.description: GUJAR KHAN- -Jhelum Deputy Commissioner Mir Reza Ozgen has directed all concerned departments to complete flood preparedness measures ahead of the monsoon season, stressing that early planning and coordinated emergency response are essential to protect lives and property.

results.title: Latvia lines up 23 investors for landmark LMT and Tet deal
results.description: The Latvian government is preparing for one of the country's largest corporate transactions in more than 15 years: the sale of Telia's stakes in mobile operator LMT and telecommunications provider Tet.
